sourceMovie.title: You're Next
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: You're Next works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hush... Hush, Sweet Charlotte
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If You're Next clicked for you, Hush... Hush, Sweet Charlotte (1964) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after You're Next?
faq.answer: Try Hush... Hush, Sweet Charlotte, Night of the Living Dead, A Perfect Getaway—each shares DNA with You're Next while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is You're Next?
faq.answer: You're Next (2013) is best described as Horror, Thriller, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is You're Next worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
